manualChecks.description: Gather, brew, collect, deliver, upgrade, reload, horizontal overflow, and console at 390x844
manualChecks.environment: Codex in-app Chromium browser on Windows; local Pocket Potion Works candidate
manualChecks.notes: Completed gather, Meadow Tonic brew and collect, matching delivery, upgrade purchase, and reload at exactly 390x844. No visible horizontal overflow and no console warnings or errors.

manualChecks.description: Gather, brew, collect, deliver, upgrade, reload, horizontal overflow, and console at 360x740
manualChecks.environment: Codex in-app Chromium browser on Windows; local Pocket Potion Works candidate
manualChecks.notes: Completed gather, brew and collect, requested Clarity delivery, upgrade purchase, and reload at exactly 360x740. No visible horizontal overflow and no console warnings or errors.

manualChecks.description: Keyboard essential controls, modal focus trap, Escape close, and focus return
manualChecks.environment: Codex in-app Chromium browser on Windows; 360x740 candidate view
manualChecks.notes: Verified native-button focus, Shift+Tab wrap from the close control to the last action, Tab wrap back to close, Escape dismissal, and focus return to Open settings.

manualChecks.description: Representative 200 percent zoom reflow without loss of essential controls or horizontal page overflow
manualChecks.environment: Codex in-app Chromium browser on Windows; 780x844 physical viewport with representative 200 percent browser zoom
manualChecks.notes: The effective mobile-width layout reflowed without losing essential controls or showing horizontal page overflow.

manualChecks.description: Default sound-off and muted core loop with no audio initialization, audible output, or blocked gameplay
manualChecks.environment: Codex in-app Chromium browser on Windows; local Pocket Potion Works candidate
manualChecks.notes: Sound remained Off across reload and both exact-size core loops. No audible output was requested or produced, and gameplay was not blocked. Automated audio tests separately prove muted mode does not initialize AudioContext.

manualChecks.description: Runtime under delivered CSP with shell load, service-worker registration, gameplay actions, Web Audio toggle, and no CSP or console errors
manualChecks.environment: Codex in-app Chromium browser on Windows; hardened server at http://127.0.0.1:4206
manualChecks.notes: Fresh candidate shell booted under the delivered CSP with all five observed runtime assets same-origin and no CSP or console warnings or errors. Sound toggle rendered Off; audio activation remained intentionally muted and is covered by deterministic Web Audio tests. Header probe confirmed CSP, no-referrer, permissions denial, frame denial, no-sniff, and same-origin resource policy; POST returned 405 and encoded traversal returned 403.
